tabs.content:
.create table gold_CustomerEvents (
    eventId:string,
    status:string,
    eventTime:datetime,
    orderID:string,
    customerId:string, 
    productId:string,
    merchantId:string,  
    customerSatisfaction:string,
    eventlogicalkeys:string


)


.create-or-alter function with (folder="update-policy") fn_gold_customerevents()
{
       Silver_CustomerEvents
    | project 
    eventId,
    status,
    eventTime,
    orderId,
    customerId, 
    productId,
    merchantId,
    customerSatisfaction
    | extend eventlogicalkeys = strcat(orderId, customerId, productId)
}





.alter table gold_CustomerEvents policy update
```[{
  "IsEnabled": true,
  "Source": "Silver_CustomerEvents",
  "Query": "fn_gold_customerevents",
}]```
